hindi: अस्य श्रीरामरक्षास्तोत्रमन्त्रस्य। बुधकौशिक ऋषिः। श्री सीताराम चन्द्रो देवता।
english: Of this Ram Raksha Stotra mantra, the sage is Budhakaushika; the deity is Sita-Ramachandra
roman: Asya Shri Rama Raksha Stotrasya. Budhakausika Riishi. Shri Sitarama Chandro devata

english: Meditate on Rama with arms reaching to the knees, holding bow and arrows, seated in lotus posture
Wearing yellow garments, with eyes that rival new lotus petals, serene
roman: Pitam vaso vasanam nava kamala dala spardhi netram prasannam

english: Sita is seated on his left, his lotus face meets her eyes, dark as a rain-cloud
roman: Vamanka rudha Sita mukha kamala milallochanam niradabham

english: Radiant with various ornaments, bearing great matted locks — Ramachandra
roman: Nanaalankara deeptam dadhatam urujata mandalam Ramachandram

hindi: रामो राजमणिः सदा विजयते रामं रमेशं भजे,
english: Ram the gem among kings ever triumphs — I worship Ram, lord of Rama (Lakshmi)
roman: Ramo Raja manih sada vijayate Ramam Ramessham bhaje

english: By Ram were the demon armies struck down — salutations to that Ram
roman: Ramenabhihata nishachara chamu Ramaya tasmai namah

english: There is no greater refuge than Ram — I am the servant of Ram

hindi: रामे चित्तलयः सदा भवतु मे भो राम मामुद्धर॥
english: May my mind ever merge in Ram — O Ram, lift me up!
roman: Rame chitta layah sada bhavatu me bho Rama mamuddhara

hindi: रक्षो घ्नं रक्ष मां राम, रक्षोघ्नः रणमर्दनः।
english: O destroyer of demons, protect me O Ram, you who crush the battle-field
roman: Rakshognam raksha mam Rama, rakshognah ranaardanah

hindi: रामाय रामभद्राय रामचन्द्राय वेधसे। रघुनाथाय नाथाय सीतायाः पतये नमः॥
english: Salutations to Rama, Ramabhadra, Ramachandra the creator; to Raghunatha the lord and husband of Sita
roman: Ramaya Ramabhadraya Ramachandraya vedhase, Raghunathaya nathaya Sitayah pataye namah
